full_prompt: Design the aluminum liner of a Type-3 composite-overwrapped pressure vessel (COPV) for 350-bar gaseous hydrogen dispensing station buffer storage in a hydrogen-pressure-vessel student benchmark, in compliance with NFPA 2 Hydrogen Technologies Code 2023, ASME BPVC Section X (fiber-reinforced pressure vessels) Class III, and SAE J2579 performance targets. The prompt scope is the AA6061-T6 aluminum liner only; the carbon-fiber/epoxy overwrap is modeled as a uniform outer pressure on the liner equal to 35% of service pressure share, and is not part of the geometry you must output. The liner is a monolithic seamless formed part, no welds, integral hemispherical-like polar bosses at both ends; one end boss carries a 1-inch UN-O-ring boss port (SAE straight thread SAE J1926-1) for a TK-25H dispenser valve, the opposite boss is blind. Liner geometry: inside diameter 250 mm, wall thickness 4.0 mm (nominal), cylindrical straight length 700 mm, polar boss opening 25 mm, overall closed length 880 mm, bounding envelope 260 mm OD x 900 mm length. Service pressure (NWP) 35 MPa (350 bar), max fill pressure 125% NWP = 43.75 MPa per SAE J2579 thermal transient allowance, minimum burst pressure of the composite vessel 2.25 x NWP = 78.75 MPa per ASME Section X Class III; liner share at burst 35% = 27.56 MPa. Operating temperature range -40 C to +85 C per SAE J2579. Material 6061-T6 aluminum at 20 C: E 68.9 GPa, nu 0.33, density 2700 kg/m^3, yield 276 MPa, UTS 310 MPa; at 85 C yield derates to 262 MPa; at -40 C yield nominal 276 MPa with Charpy impact above 27 J. Three load cases. Load Case 1 (fill cycle proof): 1.5 x NWP = 52.5 MPa total vessel internal pressure at 85 C, corresponding to liner share of 52.5 x 0.35 = 18.4 MPa of the autofrettage-residual-adjusted net liner load; for this CAD prompt apply 18.4 MPa internal pressure to the liner boundary, both bosses constrained axially. Load Case 2 (cold fast fill): -40 C metal temperature, internal 35 MPa NWP liner share 12.25 MPa, thermal gradient 70 C from +30 C gas inlet to -40 C initial wall during a 3-minute fast fill. Load Case 3 (fatigue): 11250 fill cycles over 15-year life at 35 MPa NWP liner share 12.25 MPa, ambient 20 C, per SAE J2579 pressure-cycle endurance. Pass/fail: (R1) under LC1 proof, peak von Mises in the liner must not exceed 138 MPa (yield at 85 C / 1.9, equivalent to Section X Class III liner safety factor); (R2) under LC2 cold fast fill including thermal stress, combined peak stress must not exceed 207 MPa (yield at -40 C / 1.33 short-duration transient); (R3) fatigue: under LC3 the maximum local stress in liner near boss must keep the stress range below 88 MPa to satisfy >= 22500 allowable cycles (2x life per SAE J2579) at R = 0.1 on a 6061-T6 S-N curve; (R4) a linear buckling eigenvalue analysis under external pressure (composite overwrap compressing empty liner, 5 MPa inward) must yield a first-mode factor of at least 3.0; (R5) mass of the liner must not exceed 7.5 kg; (R6) minimum wall thickness of 3.5 mm must be maintained everywhere including the knuckle-to-boss transition. Fluid and radiation analyses are not required (thermal enters only via LC2 gradient). Deliver STEP AP242 geometry plus report.
short_prompt:
Design the monolithic seamless AA6061-T6 aluminum liner of a Type-3 carbon-fiber-overwrapped pressure vessel (COPV) for a 350-bar gaseous hydrogen dispensing-station buffer tank, per NFPA 2 (2023), ASME BPVC Section X Class III, and SAE J2579 targets. Integral polar bosses at both ends, one carrying a 1-inch UN-O-ring (SAE J1926-1) valve port. The carbon-epoxy overwrap is modeled as a uniform outer pressure carrying 65% of service load; the liner carries 35%. Liner mass <= 7.5 kg, min wall 3.5 mm anywhere including knuckle-to-boss. Allowables: yield_85C / 1.9 at proof (Sect.-X Class III liner SF), yield_minus40C / 1.33 short-duration cold-fill transient, fatigue stress range <= 88 MPa (6061-T6 S-N at R = 0.1 for >= 22500 cycles, 2x design life). Buckling SF 3.0 on empty-liner external collapse.

Envelope: 250 mm ID x 4.0 mm wall x 700 mm cylindrical straight, 880 mm overall, 25 mm boss opening (260 mm OD x 900 mm envelope).

Load cases.
- LC1 proof at 85 C: 18.4 MPa internal (liner share of 1.5x NWP total vessel = 52.5 MPa).
- LC2 cold fast fill: 12.25 MPa internal at -40 C metal, with a 70 C thermal gradient from +30 C gas to -40 C wall over a 3-minute fast fill.
- LC3 fatigue: 12.25 MPa internal at 20 C, 11250 cycles over 15-year life at R = 0.1.

prompt.title: 350 bar Type-3 COPV aluminum liner for hydrogen-pressure-vessel student benchmark
prompt.brief: Seamless 6061-T6 liner with integral polar bosses; ID 250 mm, L 700 straight, NWP 35 MPa, SAE J2579 + ASME Sect. X Class III.

pass_fail_criteria.derivation: yield_85C/1.9 (ASME Section X Class III liner SF)

exclusions_explained.fluid_analysis: Hydrogen flow internal to vessel is transient gas dynamics outside liner-sizing scope.
exclusions_explained.vibration_analysis: Station storage is stationary (not mobile J2579 mobile vibration profile).

out_of_scope_but_real_world_needed: Hydrogen embrittlement of 6061 at grain boundaries

eval_coverage: SAE J2579 + ASME Section X Class III liner safety factor
pressure-cycle fatigue at boss stress concentration
external-pressure buckling of empty-liner under overwrap
